chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-1766 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 19.11.2025 Mr. Sandeep Kumar, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Sharif Soloangi Assistant A.G Sindh a/w TMO Tando Jam (Shah Jahan) and Senior Scientist Horticulture (Muhammad Ishaque Baloch) *** The bone of contentions involved in this petition is payment of pensionary benefits to divorced daughter (petitioner) by issuing modified divorce registration certificate. Learned AAG files compliance report on behalf of Town Municipal Commissioner Tando Jam, wherein it has been stated that modified Divorce Registration Certificate in respect of the petitioner has been issued on 07.06.2023. Counsel for the petitioner confirmed the issuance of modified Divorce Registration Certificate, however, he states that directions may be issued to respondents to process the case of petitioner further for pension in accordance with law and seeks disposal of the petition accordingly. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of with directions to respondents to process the case of petitioner for payment of pensionary benefits in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
